title: Art appraisers in Salt Lake City, Utah

location.name: Art appraisers in Salt Lake City, Utah

listedAppraisers.name: Alicia E Weaver – Prestige Estate Services
listedAppraisers.description: Alicia E Weaver – Prestige Estate Services provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine art (19th–20th century), Antiques, Decorative arts. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
